ddls:
CREATE TABLE "judges" (
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judge */,
  "judge_name" TEXT /* Full name of the judge */,
  "appointed_by" TEXT /* Name of the president who appointed the judge */,
  "confirmation_date" TEXT /* Date the judge was confirmed */,
  "senior_status" TEXT /* Current senior status of the judge (e.g., active, senior, retired) */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the judge */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the judge */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the judge */,
  "political_affiliation" TEXT /* Political affiliation of the judge (e.g., Democrat, Republican) */,
  "confirmation_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received during the confirmation process */,
  "confirmation_nays" INTEGER /* Number of nay votes received during the confirmation process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courts" (
  "court_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each court */,
  "court_name" TEXT /* Name of the court */,
  "court_type" TEXT /* Type of court (e.g., district, appeals, supreme) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the court */,
  "jurisdiction" TEXT /* Jurisdiction of the court */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the court was established */,
  "court_chief_judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chief judge of the court */,
  "court_address" TEXT /* Address of the court */,
  "court_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the court */,
  "court_email" TEXT /* Email address of the court */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("court_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judge_appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge */,
  "court_id" INTEGER /* ID of the court */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date the judge was appointed */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the judge ended their term */,
  "appointment_type" TEXT /* Type of appointment (e.g., recess appointment, regular appointment) */,
  "appointment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the appointment (e.g., vacancy, new position) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judge_appointments_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judge_appointments_court_id FOREIGN KEY ("court_id") REFERENCES courts ("court_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judge_court_affiliations" (
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each affiliation */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge */,
  "court_id" INTEGER /* ID of the court */,
  "affiliation_date" TEXT /* Date the judge was affiliated with the court */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the judge ended their affiliation */,
  "affiliation_type" TEXT /* Type of affiliation (e.g., active, senior, retired) */,
  "affiliation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the affiliation (e.g., appointment, transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judge_court_affiliations_court_id FOREIGN KEY ("court_id") REFERENCES courts ("court_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judge_court_affiliations_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "senior_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each senior status */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the judge assumed the senior status */,
  "status" TEXT /* Senior status of the judge (e.g., active, senior, retired) */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the senior status (e.g., retirement, resignation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_senior_statuses_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judge_education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education record */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree earned (e.g., Bachelor's, J.D.) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Date of graduation */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major field of study */,
  "minor" TEXT /* Minor field of study */,
  "honor_society" TEXT /* Honor society memberships (e.g., Phi Beta Kappa) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judge_education_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judge_professional_experience" (
  "experience_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experience record */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held (e.g., lawyer, judge) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experience */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experience */,
  "experience_type" TEXT /* Type of experience (e.g., judicial, non-judicial) */,
  "experience_reason" TEXT /* Reason for leaving the position (e.g., promotion, termination) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experience_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judge_professional_experience_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judge_publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "publication_type" TEXT /* Type of publication (e.g., book, article) */,
  "publisher_address" TEXT /* Address of the publisher */,
  "publisher_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the publisher */,
  "publisher_email" TEXT /* Email address of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judge_publications_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judge_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was received */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Name of the institution that bestowed the award */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., lifetime achievement, distinguished service) */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judge_awards_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of the access (e.g., IP address, city, state) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
